allow: Bash(powershell -Command "& { Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('2025计算机三级全部答案\(3\).rar'\) }")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; files=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'{f[\\"filename\\"]:50s} +{f[\\"additions\\"]:4d} -{f[\\"deletions\\"]:4d}'\) for f in files]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Branch: {d[\\"head\\"][\\"ref\\"]}'\); print\(f'Base: {d[\\"base\\"][\\"ref\\"]}'\); print\(f'Mergeable: {d.get\(\\"mergeable\\",\\"unknown\\"\)}'\); print\(f'Conflicts: {d.get\(\\"mergeable_state\\",\\"unknown\\"\)}'\); print\(f'Commits: {d[\\"commits\\"]}'\); print\(f'Changed files: {d[\\"changed_files\\"]}'\); print\(f'Additions: {d[\\"additions\\"]}'\); print\(f'Deletions: {d[\\"deletions\\"]}'\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('Branch:', d.head.ref\); console.log\('Base:', d.base.ref\); console.log\('Mergeable:', d.mergeable\); console.log\('State:', d.mergeable_state\); console.log\('Commits:', d.commits\); console.log\('Files:', d.changed_files\); console.log\('Additions:', d.additions\); console.log\('Deletions:', d.deletions\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/pr5.json'\); console.log\('Branch:', d.head.ref\); console.log\('Base:', d.base.ref\); console.log\('Mergeable:', d.mergeable\); console.log\('State:', d.mergeable_state\); console.log\('Commits:', d.commits\); console.log\('Files:', d.changed_files\); console.log\('+/-:', d.additions, '/', d.deletions\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./pr5.json'\); console.log\('Branch:', d.head.ref\); console.log\('Base:', d.base.ref\); console.log\('Mergeable:', d.mergeable\); console.log\('State:', d.mergeable_state\); console.log\('Commits:', d.commits\); console.log\('Files:', d.changed_files\); console.log\('+/-:', d.additions, '/', d.deletions\);")
